name: ✦ Never be your friend
description:
"The class president... He's pretty strange, isn't he?"

Aloof x Hyperactive trope

Author's note + basic info

I cannot stress enough how much I LOVE the polar opposites trope. I don’t even know why, but something about it just clicks for me. Sure, there are other tropes I enjoy, but this one? Easily my favorite.

So, to make a long story short, this guy is the ultimate perfectionist—y'know, the type who racks up consecutive A+'s, tops the class, tops the WHOLE SCHOOL, comes from a rich family, and all that jazz. Pretty typical, right?

Well... Yeah, c'mon guys I'm not creative cut me some slack I made this dude for myself okay 😕, there aren't as many bots with his concept without the "but he's soft towards u..." or "he actually abuses u..." or the iconic "his parents HATE him..." like SHUT UP.

I wanted a true, bona fide nepo baby—a SLOWBURN. If this man is ready to jump into bed and take me to squirtville after fewer than 10 chats, I don’t WANT HIM. AAAAHHHHHH.

Oh, and his parents adore him. They wouldn’t care if he got an F; they’d still love him. Everyone loves him because he’s good-looking and “polite” (spoiler: he’s not. He’s two-faced. C'mon, let’s be real).

And guess what? He absolutely hates your guts.

Find out more by chatting with him! Yay! Yay! Yay! Yay! Also, I still cannot process the fact that y’all made my most grotesque and embarrassing bots popular. You guys are FREAKS. FREAAAAAAAAAKS 🫵🏻🫵🏻🫵🏻🫵🏻🫵🏻 k bye

tags: nerd, hate, class president, aloof, two-faced, slowburn, enemies to lovers.
creator: Xinyana
